name: pii_scrub
title: PII / sensitive-data redaction
description: Apply intent-, pattern-, and value-level redaction (beyond the column blocklist) to a result set before it leaves the tool boundary. Enforced server-side as a HARD validation-gate constraint — the orchestrator/LLM never sees unredacted sensitive data. Honors the existing sensitive-column blocklist plus the propagated Entra user claim for coarse allow/deny.

user_claim.description: Propagated Entra identity for coarse allow/deny (row-level ACLs are out of scope for the PoC).

policy.description: Named PII policy (blocklist + patterns) to apply.

redactions.description: Auditable record of what was redacted and why.
